- `Models/Recipe.cs` - Recipe model with categories

- `Components/Pages/Categories.razor` - Browse by category

- `Components/StarRating.razor` - Star rating widget (interactive)
- Update NavMenu
- Delete Counter.razor, Weather.razor

+                    "Grill or broil chicken until lightly charred.",
+                    "Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger until soft.",
+                    "Add tomato sauce and garam masala; simmer 15 minutes.",
+                    "Stir in cream and add the cooked chicken.",
+                    "Simmer 10 minutes and serve with basmati rice."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 15, RatingSum = 70
+            },
+            new()
+            {
+                Id = 4, Title = "Vegetable Pad Thai", Category = "Thai",
+                Description = "A vibrant stir-fried noodle dish with crunchy vegetables and tangy sauce.",

+                TotalRatings = 5, RatingSum = 21

+        _nextId = 8;

+    public List<string> GetCategories() =>
+        _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().OrderBy(c => c).ToList();
+
+    public List<Recipe> GetRecipesByCategory(string category) =>
+        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+
+    public Recipe? GetRecipeById(int id) =>
+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetRecipeById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && stars is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.TotalRatings++;
+            recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+        }
+    }
+
+    public Recipe AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
+    {
+        var recipe = new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = submission.Title,
+            Category = submission.Category,
+            Description = $"A community-submitted {submission.Category.ToLower()} recipe.",
+            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList(),
+            Steps = submission.Steps
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList()
+        };
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+        return recipe;
+    }
+}

+                    "Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, sugar, and lime juice for the sauce.",
+                    "Stir-fry carrots and bean sprouts over high heat.",
+                    "Add noodles and sauce, tossing to combine.",
+                    "Top with crushed peanuts and serve with lime wedges."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 6, RatingSum = 26
+            },
+            new()
+            {
+                Id = 5, Title = "Beef Tacos", Category = "Mexican",
+                Description = "Seasoned ground beef tacos with fresh toppings.",
+                Ingredients = ["Ground beef", "Taco shells", "Lettuce", "Tomato", "Cheddar cheese", "Sour cream", "Taco seasoning"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat.",
+                    "Add taco seasoning and water; simmer until thickened.",
+                    "Warm taco shells in the oven.",
+                    "Fill shells with seasoned beef.",
+                    "Top with shredded lettuce, diced tomato, cheese, and sour cream."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 10, RatingSum = 42
+            },
+            new()
+            {
+                Id = 6, Title = "Chocolate Lava Cake", Category = "Desserts",
+                Description = "Individual cakes with a molten chocolate center.",
+                Ingredients = ["Dark chocolate", "Butter", "Eggs", "Sugar", "Flour", "Vanilla extract"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Grease ramekins.",
+                    "Melt chocolate and butter together; let cool slightly.",
+                    "Whisk eggs and sugar until thick and pale.",
+                    "Fold chocolate mixture into eggs, then fold in flour.",
+                    "Pour into ramekins and bake 12–14 minutes.",
+                    "Invert onto plates and serve immediately."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 20, RatingSum = 96
+            },
+            new()
+            {
+                Id = 7, Title = "Greek Salad", Category = "Salads",
+                Description = "A refreshing Mediterranean salad with feta and olives.",
+                Ingredients = ["Cucumber", "Tomatoes", "Red onion", "Kalamata olives", "Feta cheese", "Olive oil", "Oregano"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion into chunks.",
+                    "Combine vegetables in a large bowl.",
+                    "Add olives and crumbled feta cheese.",
+                    "Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with oregano.",
+                    "Toss gently and serve."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 5, RatingSum = 21
+            },
+        ];
+        _nextId = 8;

+
+    public List<string> GetCategories() =>
+        _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().OrderBy(c => c).ToList();
+
+    public List<Recipe> GetRecipesByCategory(string category) =>
+        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+
+    public Recipe? GetRecipeById(int id) =>
+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetRecipeById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && stars is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.TotalRatings++;
+            recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+        }
+    }
+
+    public Recipe AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
+    {
+        var recipe = new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = submission.Title,
+            Category = submission.Category,
+            Description = $"A community-submitted {submission.Category.ToLower()} recipe.",
+            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList(),
+            Steps = submission.Steps
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList()
+        };
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+        return recipe;
+    }
+}

data.content:
The project builds successfully. Here's what was created:

**Project:** `RecipeCommunity` — Blazor Web App with Interactive Server rendering

**Structure:**
- `Models/Recipe.cs` — `Recipe` and `RecipeSubmission` models
- `Services/RecipeService.cs` — Singleton service with 7 seed recipes across 6 categories
- `Components/Pages/HomePage.razor` — Homepage with category cards (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/CategoryPage.razor` — Lists recipes in a category with star previews (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/RecipePage.razor` — Full recipe with interactive `StarRating` widget (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
- `Components/Pages/SubmitRecipe.razor` — Form with title, category, ingredients, steps (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
- `Components/StarRating.razor` — Click-to-rate 1–5 stars widget (interactive, one vote per session)

**Key design choices:**
- Only pages needing interactivity (`RecipePage`, `SubmitRecipe`, `StarRating`) use `InteractiveServer` — the rest are static SSR
- `RecipeService` registered as singleton for shared in-memory state
- Removed default Counter/Weather pages; updated NavMenu with Home + Submit Recipe links

Run with `cd RecipeCommunity && dotnet run`.
